planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 now tests a friction-cone-aware WBC/MPC planner variant instead of reward-only, wrapper-only, or future-command-only routes.

perspectives.product: targets the exact remaining slip/knee/return tradeoff around the best contact-qfrc branch
perspectives.architecture: reuses exp91 WBC-lite planner and changes feasibility weights/health gates, not observation shape
perspectives.security: local MuJoCo run only; no credentials
perspectives.qa: native exp29 visible gate; browser replay only if native passes
perspectives.skeptic: slip/support proxies are not a full friction-cone QP and may still overfit MuJoCo qfrc assistance

dod: raw native JSON per friction-aware variant
summary states whether any native variant passes exp29 visible gate

friction_rank_basis.extra_penalty: slip_excess weighted higher as a friction-cone proxy
friction_rank_basis.note: MuJoCo contact force vectors are not fully reconstructed here; slip/support/ZMP are used as native feasibility proxies.
